{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-7814", "cvss": {"score": 4.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 4.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:H/UI:P/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "Stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in pgAdmin 4 Browser Tree and Explain Visualizer modules.

User-controlled PostgreSQL object names (database, schema, table, column, etc.) were assigned to DOM elements via innerHTML, allowing crafted object names containing HTML markup to execute attacker-supplied JavaScript in the browser of any pgAdmin user who navigated to or executed EXPLAIN over the malicious object.

Fix replaces innerHTML with textContent.

This issue affects pgAdmin 4: before 9.15.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00163, "percentile": 0.05788}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6p2c-69cv-3fxq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T14:32:31Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6p2c-69cv-3fxq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6p2c-69cv-3fxq"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-7814"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-11T16:17:37Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T18:31:44Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7814", "https://github.com/pgadmin-org/pgadmin4/issues/9865", "https://github.com/pgadmin-org/pgadmin4/pull/9865", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6p2c-69cv-3fxq"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/pgadmin-org/pgadmin4", "summary": "pgAdmin 4: Stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Browser Tree and Explain Visualizer modules", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-18T14:32:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6p2c-69cv-3fxq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "9.15", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pgadmin4"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 9.15"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pgAdmin 4: Stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Browser Tree and Explain Visualizer modules
